steps.title: Identify what 'actually' reveals
steps.content: The passage sets up a trade-off where greater height has opposite effects: more ears (advantage) but wind damage preventing harvest (disadvantage). The word “actually” signals specialists are identifying which factor truly determines success in practice.

steps.title: Find the practical determining factor
steps.content:
A identifies that factor: shorter varieties will improve harvested yields by surviving strong winds, overcoming the disadvantage of fewer ears per plant.

The other choices contradict the passage's wind-damage claim or address irrelevant factors.

A is correct.
